title: Industry
text:
Traditional defense contractors, corporations, and startups are critical parts of our innovation ecosystem.
Industry partners help us design and test revolutionary technologies and transition prototypes into military and civilian applications.
Contracting Opportunities
Interested in partnering on research programs or transition efforts?
Explore our open opportunities, including Broad Agency Announcements (BAAs), Requests for Proposals (RFPs), and Requests for Information (RFIs). | See all Opportunities
New to DARPA?
No matter where you are in your journey with us, DARPAConnect is a valuable resource. Get access to a comprehensive curriculum, proposal support, mentoring, and one-on-one coaching. | Get Connected
Come to Proposers Day
Great ideas can come from anywhere. Our program managers welcome input from prospective industry partners on new research ideas, emerging technologies, and technology transition efforts.
The best way to connect with our program managers is to attend a Proposers Day event. | See all Events
Help for Small Businesses
